auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
Click the link below to sign in to DKV@Home:

[Sign in to DKV]({auth_url})

After login you will be redirected. Copy the full URL from the address bar (it contains `?code=…`) and paste it below.

> If the code has expired, a new login link will be generated automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
Click the link below to sign in to DKV@Home again:

[Sign in to DKV]({auth_url})

After login you will be redirected. Copy the full URL from the address bar (it contains `?code=…`) and paste it below.

> If the code has expired, a new login link will be generated automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.code_expired: Code expired or already used – a new login link has been generated. Please click the new link FROM THE FORM and sign in again!
error.wrong_auth_url: The code belongs to a different login link (wrong tab or old link). A new link has been generated. Please click the link FROM THE FORM and sign in again!
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the full redirect URL (with ?code=…) or a refresh token (starts with 'eyJ').
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the full redirect URL.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
